{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220224199B736C85AEC8370807A5"}"},"total":6050},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7407492986313917208","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"要笑死了，太好看了，发癫文。我小时候看那些忍者神龟一样的龙王，就很不爽，自作孽的，有证据不用，自己引起误会了不解释，看着都窝囊，很想把那些什么龙王啊战神啊教育一遍！！！这本书满足了我曾经的愿望了！男主和女主的感情线也特别有意思，总之就是很搞笑，很爽！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724698150,"group_id":"7384793129250999320","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"花空烟水流","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6/ug0Z7uTs8hl+B2vckNIrDGSPYIAf9q7AfFOynm4/O","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f522b4229c9340d58cec4a78f4163fe5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708064&x-signature=S%2FfutFgWhugXw1RztllnsrP%2F9N8%3D","user_id":"2562330123582016","user_name":"飒彧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2562330123582016","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7384793129250999320","book_info":{"abstract":"我叫秦洛，身穿进了这本结合了各种龙王剧情的都市文里。
开局获得了个《最强走狗系统》，只要不断做走狗之事就能变强。
那还能怎么办？
选择成为最终大反派苏牧婉的贴身跟班。
挑衅各种天命之人，抢夺机缘，无恶不作。
你问我背后之人到底是谁？
哼！我家小姐的名讳你不配知道！
......
.......
我叫苏牧婉，乃是苏家大小姐，从小武学天赋超绝，因此养成了前世飞扬跋扈的个性。
甚至愚蠢到屡次挑衅那些受老天眷顾的天命之人，最终导致了惨死的下场。
这一世，我必须要安分守己，绝对不能再走老路！！
只是........
啪！！
“就你小子是龙王啊？！”
当看着自己那个小跟班耀武扬威狠狠抽了隐瞒身份的龙王一巴掌的时候。
苏牧婉悬着的心终于死了，看着面前对自己忠心耿耿的走狗秦洛，她当场气晕了过去。
天要亡我！！
（纯爱1V1，轻松，不刀，单女主，反派，重生，走狗）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6d4d1554124fef6503c7ee1d7689c6e7","author":"牛头人战士","author_id":"","book_id":"7384793129250999320","book_name":"不是哥们，我一天道，你一掌秒我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8c8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7385003249134223934","read_count":"102056","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1603183"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":
